name: Check Into Cash
description_short: At 129 W Sunset Dr in Waukesha, WI 53186, Check Into Cash can be reached at +1 262-544-2001.
description_long: Check Into Cash is an established short-term lending company that has operated for 30 years, providing emergency financial solutions to consumers in need of quick cash. The company operates multiple physical store locations, including one in Ferndale, Michigan, alongside an online lending platform. Their primary focus is serving customers facing unexpected expenses or cash flow gaps between paychecks. The Ferndale location is staffed during extended business hours (8am-7pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) to accommodate working customers. Check Into Cash positions itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for consumers who need funds immediately and may not qualify for conventional loans. The company emphasizes the speed and simplicity of its application process, claiming customers can walk out with cash in hand if approved. Their 30-year operational history suggests established relationships with regulators and consistent market presence, though this also reflects the enduring demand for high-cost short-term lending. What distinguishes Check Into Cash from competitors is its hybrid model combining physical retail locations with online lending capabilities, multiple loan product types beyond payday loans, and integrated financial services like check cashing and money transfers. The company offers transparent state-by-state rates and terms information and maintains compliance documentation. However, the critical caveat is that payday loans and title loans are inherently high-cost products. While the website does not disclose specific APRs, payday loans typically carry rates between 400-600% APR, making them expensive emergency solutions. The company's emphasis on quick approval and same-day cash access caters to financially vulnerable populations who may lack alternatives. Consumers should view Check Into Cash as a last-resort option for genuine emergencies, not a sustainable financial strategy.
pros: Same-day or next-day cash funding available both in-store and online
Low loan minimums (payday loans up to $600) accessible to customers with limited credit history
Multiple physical locations plus online platform for convenient access
Integrated financial services including check cashing, bill pay, Western Union, and Green Dot card products
Extended business hours (8am-7pm weekdays) accommodate working customers
Quick application process requiring only SSN, ID, checking account info, and proof of income
Established 30-year operating history with state licensing and regulatory compliance
Transparent disclosure of state-specific rates and terms online
cons: Payday and title loans carry extremely high APRs (typically 400-600% annualized), making them expensive emergency debt
Specific APR and fee information not disclosed on the website; customers must visit stores or request rates
Title loans require surrendering vehicle title as collateral, creating risk of vehicle loss if unable to repay
Loan amounts capped at $600 for payday loans, insufficient for larger emergencies
No mention of flexible repayment options or hardship programs if unable to repay on due date
Products described as not available at all locations, limiting service consistency
best_for: Workers facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (medical bills, car repairs) between paychecks with no other options
Individuals with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit cards
Customers who own vehicles with clear titles and need larger amounts than payday loan maximums
People needing ancillary financial services like check cashing or bill payment alongside a small loan
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is appropriate for employed individuals with legitimate short-term cash emergencies who have exhausted other options and can realistically repay within the loan term. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are high-cost debt solutions (400-600% APR range) that should never be used for ongoing expenses or non-emergencies, as the interest accumulates rapidly and traps borrowers in debt cycles.
services: Payday loans up to $600 with same-day funding in-store and online
Title loans using vehicle title as collateral
Installment loans with longer terms and lower payments than payday loans
Flex Line of Credit for repeated borrowing within a credit limit
Check cashing for personal and government checks
Green Dot Visa Debit Card accounts
Online loan applications and account management
